MINI MINUTES: appearances: richard canatella for and with josephine garrett. mr canatella request to meet with ms pam meyers (examiner) and have the matter passed. after returning to the court room mr canatella proposes to file a 5th amended petition and submit a proposed order. the court takes the matter under submission. judge:john dearman reporter:leticia perez clerk:rosie noguera
